skill_contents_not_bundled_copy.evidence: Export results now show visible localized copy: "Recommended skill references are listed for diagnostics only; skill contents are not bundled."

bundle_or_install_behavior.evidence: No automatic install, bundle payload, localStorage repair, server, package, or save-file fallback behavior was added.
